title: Result of IN should never be NULL if the RHS is empty
key_bug_features: IN clause returns NULL with empty right-hand side
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, salary REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age, salary) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 50000.00);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age, salary) VALUES ('Bob', NULL, 60000.00);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL AND salary > 55000.00);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Charlie' AND age IS NOT NULL) AND salary IS NULL;
